Description
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews

com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service
 
  • Classes in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service used by com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Class
    Description
    FavouriteService
    Manages the current user's favourited songs.
    LibraryService
    Thin facade for song, album, and artist retrieval.
    MusicPlayerService
    Time Complexity: O(1) for all operations Space Complexity: O(n) where n = queue size
    PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: Create/delete: O(1) single database operation Add/remove song: O(1) list manipulation in memory Get playlists: O(n) where n = user's playlists Space Complexity: O(n) where n = playlist size (songs in playlist)
  • Classes in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service used by com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.playlist
    Class
    Description
    MusicPlayerService
    Time Complexity: O(1) for all operations Space Complexity: O(n) where n = queue size
    PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: Create/delete: O(1) single database operation Add/remove song: O(1) list manipulation in memory Get playlists: O(n) where n = user's playlists Space Complexity: O(n) where n = playlist size (songs in playlist)

    Class
    Description
    MusicPlayerService
    Time Complexity: O(1) for all operations Space Complexity: O(n) where n = queue size

    Description
